query: Deploy 403 after CI token rotation workspace access update CI secret rerun deploy job
append: Also check deployment service account after rotating CI token.
title: Deploy 403 after service account rotation
description: Fix deploy failures after rotating a CI service account token.

query: Deploy 403 CI token rotation workspace access namespace Kubernetes secret
title: Deploy 403 namespace secret
description: Avoid duplicate note when the namespace secret check is already documented.

query: TestFlight upload rejected because iOS provisioning profile expired during mobile app release
append: Renew the iOS provisioning profile, regenerate the signing certificate, and rerun the TestFlight upload.
title: TestFlight upload rejected by expired provisioning profile
description: Fix mobile release uploads rejected because the provisioning profile expired.

query: production access request manager approval ticket temporary role expiration audit log
append: For break-glass access, include the incident ID and schedule a follow-up review.
title: Break-glass production access
description: Adds break-glass details to the production access process.

query: production access request manager approval ticket temporary role expiration audit log
append: Record the ticket owner before granting emergency production access.
title: Emergency production access owner
description: Conflict scenario for production access writeback.

query: SQLite FTS5 unicode61 remove_diacritics Portuguese accent insensitive local index search tokenizer
append: Keep remove_diacritics=2 enabled so Portuguese queries work with or without accents.
title: SQLite FTS5 accent-insensitive tokenizer
description: Document the tokenizer choice for Portuguese search.

query: sessao expira apos autenticacao renovacao token usuario suporte cookie ativo
append: Registrar nos atendimentos se o cookie antigo continuou ativo depois da renovação do token.
title: Sessão expira depois da renovação de token
description: Atualiza o runbook de autenticação em português.

query: customer refund webhook from payment provider returns timeout during reconciliation settlement batch
append: Capture provider request ID, retry the refund reconciliation job, and compare settlement batch status.
title: Refund webhook timeout during reconciliation
description: Fix payment provider refund webhook timeouts during reconciliation.

query: personal weekly planning dashboard idea goals review habit metrics focus backlog
append: Track weekly focus, open loops, and follow-up decisions in one dashboard note.
title: Weekly planning dashboard idea
description: Personal note for a weekly planning dashboard.
